description: Machine limits, peck fractions, RPM/Vf formulas, ae/ap heuristics, and pass-type Vc/fz sourcing — mirrors 8. parameter_calculation.py. Per-tool Vc, fz, ap_max, ae_max, ae_fraction, ramp_plunge remain in 7a. tool_database.json (AD-003, AD-004).

peck_fractions_of_tool_diameter.comment: Q = drill_diameter × fraction for G83; keys are coolant then cycle

formulas.rpm_cap: If RPM > max_spindle_rpm, cap and recompute actual_Vc from capped RPM

vc_fz_source_by_pass_type.RF: Prefer tool_rec.Vc_rough[material] and fz_rough[material]; else material_params

depth_fallbacks.face_mill_depth: cluster depth if present else ap from tool or 2.0 mm

axial_depth_ap.mills_with_ap_max: ap = min(ap_max_mm from DB, depth) when depth known

radial_depth_ae.face_mill: ae = ae_fraction × tool_dia if set; else ae_max; else 0.75 × tool_dia

face_mill_by_pass.description: Stepover percentages for face milling by pass type. Source: ShiaanX_Strategy_Rules_Final for face.xlsx (Gaurav). Overrides generic ae_fraction from tool DB when op is face_mill.

contour_mill_by_pass.cap: min(ae_max, tool_dia × ratio) when ae_max present

axial_depth_ap_by_pass.description: Explicit ap (DOC) values for face milling by pass type. Source: strategy rules sheet (Gaurav). Overrides tool DB ap_max when op is face_mill.

coolant_by_operation.description: Operation-type coolant overrides — takes precedence over machine global default. Source: strategy rules sheet (all face rules use flood, not through_spindle).

spring_pass_note: A spring pass is a repeat of the finish pass at zero additional DOC. It recovers elastic deflection of the tool and workpiece that occurred on the first finish pass. For aluminium facing, the strategy sheet marks Is_Finishing=TRUE rules with Spring_Pass=TRUE. In practice: emit a third face_mill step with pass_type=SPRING, identical parameters to FINISH, zero stock_to_leave. Not yet implemented in process_selection.py — tracked for future addition.

ramp_plunge.rule: vf_ramp / vf_plunge as percent of cutting Vf at runtime (AD-004); not duplicated here.

warnings: If tool_id is NOT_FOUND, parameters are skipped with a note.

LIVE (applied at import): machine_defaults (max_spindle_rpm, coolant_default), peck_fractions_of_tool_diameter, tsc_small_drill_boost.vc_multiplier, safety_and_rounding (min_vf, rpm_round_to, vf_round_to), cycle_time_estimation_s.tool_change_per_unique_tool.
DOCUMENTATION ONLY (not yet globals): axial_depth_ap, radial_depth_ae, depth_fallbacks, vc_fz_source_by_pass_type — these are inline logic in calculate_parameters().
